Name: Farm Rietpan 418 – Portion 1 (550ha Dryland Grain)
Description: Title Deed for Portion 1 of Farm Rietpan 418, Bothaville, Free State. 550 hectares of deep, high-potential Avalon soil under dryland maize rotation. SG Diagram T9087/1998. DAFF soil classification: Ia.
LockedReason: Pledged as collateral – Absa AgriFinance farm bond

Name: Farm Rietpan 418 – Portion 2 (380ha Dryland + Irrigation)
Description: Title Deed for Portion 2 of Farm Rietpan 418. 380 hectares including 80ha under centre-pivot irrigation. Predominantly Clovelly soil. Grain silo complex on this portion. Registered 2005.
LockedReason: Pledged as collateral – Absa AgriFinance farm bond

Name: Farm Kalkspruit 502 – Portion 1 (490ha Sunflower Land)
Description: Title Deed for Farm Kalkspruit 502 Portion 1, Reitz district. 490 hectares of calcareous pan soils suitable for sunflower and sorghum rotation. SG No. T4512/2010.

Name: Farm Klipdam 315 – Portion 3 (640ha Maize & Sorghum)
Description: Title Deed for Farm Klipdam 315 Portion 3, Bethlehem district. 640 hectares of deep red-brown Bainsvlei soil, ideal for maize/sorghum rotation. Includes a 15 ML farm dam. Title registered 2015.

Name: Farm Wilgerfontein 622 – Portion 1 (310ha Wheat Land)
Description: Title Deed for Farm Wilgerfontein 622, Harrismith district. 310 hectares of high altitude (1,650m), sandy loam soils suited to wheat and canola. SG Diagram T8214/2018.

Name: Homestead Plot – Farm Rietpan 418 (5ha Yard and Buildings)
Description: Title Deed for 5-hectare homestead plot. Main farmhouse (8-bedroom), 3 worker cottages, workshop (500m²), diesel tank room, fertilizer store and grain reception area. SG No. T9087/1998/H.

Name: John Deere 9R 590 Combine Harvester (S/N: 1H09R590PNL066731)
Description: 2023 John Deere 9R 590 combine, 590hp, 12-row row-crop header, 22,700L grain tank. HarvestSmart automation, GPS yield mapping, moisture sensor. Primary harvester for maize, sunflower and sorghum.

Name: CASE IH Optum 300 CVX Tractor #1 (S/N: JJAFEDH2SLZ035819)
Description: 2022 CASE IH Optum 300 CVX tractor, 300hp, CVT gearbox, 4WD, AutoGuidance RTK. Used for deep ripping, planting and spraying operations. Fitted with 4-tonne front weight pack.

Name: CASE IH Optum 300 CVX Tractor #2 (S/N: JJAFEDH2SLZ035820)
Description: 2022 CASE IH Optum 300 CVX tractor, 300hp, CVT gearbox, 4WD, AutoGuidance RTK. Second unit for large-scale operations and cover crop planting. Used with Väderstad Rapid disc-on-disc planter.

Name: Becker Grain Complex – 3,000-Tonne Steel Silo System
Description: Becker 3,000-tonne grain silo complex (6 x 500t bins with aeration, temperature cable monitoring and grain conveyor system). Soybean, maize and sunflower storage. Capacity expanded 2023.

Name: Hardi Navigator 6000 Self-Propelled Sprayer (S/N: HSNB02491)
Description: 2021 Hardi Navigator 6000 self-propelled sprayer, 6000L tank, 36m boom, GPS boom section control and AutoRate nozzle control. Used for fungicide and herbicide application across all crop blocks.

Name: GSI Grain Dryer – 3,000 Bushel/Hour LP Gas Dryer
Description: GSI Mixed-flow grain dryer, 3,000 bushel/hour (76 t/hr) capacity. Runs on LP gas. Installed on grain complex for drying high-moisture maize during wet harvest. Installed 2020.

Name: Valley 8000 Centre-Pivot Irrigation System – 80ha (Portion 2)
Description: Valley 8000 centre-pivot, 400m span, 80 hectares coverage on Portion 2 of Farm Rietpan. Variable-rate irrigation with soil-moisture data integration. Crops: maize, sunflower, soybeans. Installed 2019.

Name: 2025/26 White Maize Standing Crop – 600ha (Rietpan + Klipdam)
Description: 600 hectares of PAN 8816W hybrid white maize, planted November 2025. Currently at V10 vegetative stage. Expected yield 8 t/ha under normal rainfall. 30% pre-sold on SAFEX forward.

Name: 2025/26 Sunflower Standing Crop – 490ha (Kalkspruit)
Description: 490 hectares of Agsun 5125CL sunflower hybrid, planted December 2025 on Kalkspruit farm. Currently at R1 heading stage. Expected yield 1.8 t/ha. 40% committed via AgriSA spot contract.

Name: 2025 Winter Wheat Standing Crop – 310ha (Wilgerfontein)
Description: 310 hectares of SST 822 wheat variety, planted June 2025 on Wilgerfontein farm. Currently at flag-leaf stage. Expected yield 4.5 t/ha under dryland conditions. 100% pre-sold to Sasko Milling.

Name: 2025/26 Sorghum Standing Crop – 200ha (Klipdam)
Description: 200 hectares of Pannar PEX 6E sorghum, planted December 2025. Drought-tolerant crop for marginal soil areas of Klipdam farm. Expected yield 3.5 t/ha. All committed to SAB (South African Breweries).

Name: 2025 Winter Canola Standing Crop – 80ha (Wilgerfontein)
Description: 80 hectares of Hyola 600RR canola, planted May 2025. Currently at green pod stage. Expected yield 2.0 t/ha. Rooirand Oil Mills purchase contract secured at R11,200/tonne.

Name: SAFEX White Maize Forward – 4,800T (March 2026 Contract)
Description: Registered SAFEX white maize forward sale, 4,800 tonnes at R5,120/tonne (March 2026 contract). 30% hedge of expected maize harvest. Registered through Senwes Grain as agent. Contract No. SAFEX/MAR26/WM/00412.

Name: SAFEX Sunflower Forward – 2,000T (March 2026 Contract)
Description: Registered SAFEX sunflower forward sale, 2,000 tonnes at R8,950/tonne (March 2026 contract). 40% hedge of Kalkspruit sunflower crop. Registered through Grainvest. Contract No. SAFEX/MAR26/SF/00189.

Name: SAFEX Wheat Forward – 1,400T (September 2025 Contract)
Description: Registered SAFEX wheat forward sale, 1,400 tonnes at R7,800/tonne (September 2025 contract). Full hedge of Wilgerfontein wheat crop. Registered through OVK Koöperasie. Contract No. SAFEX/SEP25/W/00351.

Name: Rietpan Farm Dam Aquaculture – 8,000 Tilapia (15ML dam)
Description: Cage aquaculture stocking in 15ML farm dam on Rietpan Farm. 8,000 Nile tilapia (Oreochromis niloticus) in 2 floating net cages. Supplementary feeding. Provides protein for farm workers.

Name: Vrystaat Wildflower Honey Apiary – 80 Langstroth Hives
Description: 80 Langstroth hive apiary across 4 sites on Rietpan and Klipdam farms. Apis mellifera capensis colonies foraging on summer wildflowers and sunflower crops. 3.2 tonnes honey/annum.

Name: Orange River Irrigation Entitlement – 800,000 m³/annum
Description: DWS Water Use License Ref No: 14/D72G/BCJ/5501. Authorized 800,000 m³/annum abstraction from Orange River canal for centre-pivot and flood irrigation on Portions 1 & 2 of Rietpan farm.

Name: Väderstad Rapid 800C Disc-on-Disc Planter (8m, 16-row)
Description: 2024 Väderstad Rapid A 800C disc-on-disc planter, 8m working width, 16 rows, GPS section control, Seed Force down-pressure monitoring. Used for maize and sunflower planting at 8km/hr.
